ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not recorded by Maylender as a member of the Fucina Academy in Messina. For Fulgenzio Arminio`s affiliation to the Fucina Academy see Il Duello Delle Muse, Monteleone, 1667 (British Library Shelfmark: Ac.8850.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
